title: taraxacum miniatum
intro: Taraxacum miniatum, also known as dwarf dandelion or miniature dandelion, is a small species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum miniatum include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
